## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `python -m py_compile run_chem_pdf_extractor.py`.
- [ ] I have run `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`.
- [ ] I did not commit real API keys, tokens, passwords, or `config.local.json`.
- [ ] I did not commit private PDFs, unpublished manuscripts, or confidential files.
- [ ] I did not commit local absolute paths or private logs.
- [ ] Any example data is synthetic, public-domain, or permission-safe.
- [ ] If this PR changes documentation, I updated the relevant docs.
- [ ] If this PR changes outputs or examples, I confirmed they do not contain private or copyrighted data.
